labels.label: Eye Makeup
labels.description: Products center on eyebrow, eyeliner, eye shadow, and makeup brush items for eye-focused makeup application.
labels.notes: Dominant theme is eye makeup and related applicators.

labels.label: Cosmetic Storage Containers
labels.description: Reusable bottles, jars, tubes, pouches, and toiletry organizers for storing or transporting beauty products.
labels.notes: Mostly empty/refillable containers and beauty storage accessories.

labels.label: Miscellaneous Beauty Accessories
labels.description: A mixed cluster of small beauty, personal care, and accessory items without one clear product family.
labels.notes: Samples contain many unrelated outliers, so a broad miscellaneous accessory label is safest.

labels.label: Hair Extensions
labels.description: Human and synthetic hair bundles, braiding hair, tape-ins, toppers, closures, and clip-in extensions.
labels.notes: Strongly centered on add-on hair products rather than wigs.

labels.label: Hair Styling Tools
labels.description: Heated and heatless tools for curling, straightening, drying, diffusing, and styling hair.
labels.notes: One wax warmer outlier, but the dominant theme is hair styling equipment.

labels.label: Hair Care Products
labels.description: Shampoos, conditioners, detanglers, hair oils, styling creams, and treatments for hair maintenance.
labels.notes: Covers both cleansing/conditioning and styling/treatment products.

labels.label: Nail Care
labels.description: Nail polish, false nails, nail brushes, files, stamping kits, wraps, and manicure tools.
labels.notes: Clearly dominated by nail products and manicure supplies.

labels.label: Hair Clips & Ties
labels.description: Hair clips, barrettes, scrunchies, bows, pins, bun makers, and related decorative hair accessories.
labels.notes: Mostly fastening and decorative hair accessories, with a few hairpiece items.

labels.label: Headbands & Hair Wraps
labels.description: Headbands, hair bands, wraps, shower caps, and similar headwear-style hair accessories.
labels.notes: Headbands are the dominant product type, with shower caps as a recurring related outlier.

labels.label: False Eyelashes
labels.description: False lashes, lash extensions, mascara, lash tools, adhesives, removers, and lash storage accessories.
labels.notes: Strong lash and mascara theme across the samples.

labels.label: Face Skincare
labels.description: Facial serums, creams, masks, cleansers, eye patches, and anti-aging skincare treatments.
labels.notes: Mostly facial skincare, though there are some makeup and body/foot care items.

labels.label: Cleansing Tools & Wipes
labels.description: Facial cleansing wipes, makeup remover cloths, cleansing brushes, exfoliating tools, and skin cleaning accessories.
labels.notes: Dominant theme is cleansing and removal tools, with some massage and applicator outliers.

labels.label: Wigs
labels.description: Synthetic and human hair wigs, lace front wigs, headband wigs, wig caps, and wig stands.
labels.notes: Very consistent wig cluster.

labels.label: Grooming Tools
labels.description: Shaving, trimming, oral care, and personal grooming tools plus replacement blades and cases.
labels.notes: Mainly men's grooming and oral care tools, with several unrelated beauty tool outliers.

labels.label: Fragrance & Deodorant
labels.description: Perfumes, eau de toilette, fragrance sets, deodorants, scented body products, and aroma items.
labels.notes: Fragrance is dominant, but body wash, setting spray, and hairspray add ambiguity.

labels.label: Bath & Body Cleansers
labels.description: Soaps, hand washes, body washes, shower gels, bath bombs, wipes, and bath cleansing accessories.
labels.notes: Cleansing and bath products dominate despite a few skincare-adjacent items.

labels.label: Makeup
labels.description: Lip products, face powders, palettes, mascara, eyeshadow, bronzers, and general color cosmetics.
labels.notes: Broad color cosmetics cluster with a few nail and tanning outliers.

labels.label: Body Moisturizers & Oils
labels.description: Body lotions, oils, creams, tanning lotions, balms, and moisturizing personal care products.
labels.notes: Cluster is mixed with supplements, fragrance, pomade, and other outliers, but moisturizers and oils are the best dominant theme.

labels.label: Temporary Tattoos
labels.description: Temporary body tattoos, tattoo stickers, tattoo supplies, nail decals, and transfer designs.
labels.notes: Temporary tattoos dominate, with nail decals and professional tattoo supplies mixed in.

labels.label: Hair Brushes & Combs
labels.description: Detangling brushes, combs, beard combs, styling brushes, and related grooming brush tools.
labels.notes: Mostly brushes and combs for hair or beard grooming, with minor tool-kit outliers.
